criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The number of downloads and active users of the app.

criteria.name: Features
criteria.description: The range and sophistication of features offered by the app, such as budgeting tools, investment tracking, bill reminders, and AI-powered insights.

criteria.name: User Reviews
criteria.description: The average rating and number of reviews left by users on app marketplaces.

criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI integration in the app, such as predictive analytics, chatbots, and automated financial advice.
